description_long: This is a modern, abstract wall clock featuring twelve thick, rectangular black spokes radiating from a central hub, resembling a starburst or sunburst pattern. The clock face lacks any numerals or traditional markers, relying solely on the geometric arrangement of the spokes to indicate hours. Two metallic hands, one shorter and broader for the hour and one longer and narrower for the minute, are mounted at the center and contrast sharply against the dark background. The clock is very slim in profile, with all components closely aligned to the wall surface, giving it a sleek and minimalist appearance. The materials appear to be primarily metal, with a matte or semi-gloss finish, and the construction suggests durability and a contemporary aesthetic. This design is both decorative and functional, making it a striking focal point in modern urban environments.
description: A modern, starburst-style wall clock with twelve black rectangular spokes and two metallic hands, featuring a minimalist face with no numerals or markers. Its sleek, slim profile and bold geometric design make it a striking decorative timepiece.
description_view_0: Front view showing all twelve black spokes radiating from the center, with both metallic hands clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the clock's extremely slim depth and the alignment of the hands and spokes close to the wall.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view displaying the full starburst pattern without the clock hands visible, emphasizing the geometric design.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the clock's thinness and the flat arrangement of the spokes.
attribute_face_design: Starburst pattern with twelve thick black spokes radiating from the center, no numerals or markers, and a minimalist, geometric aesthetic.
